Intro + What To Expect
PLEASE NOTE:
This is a legacy course that I created when I hit 10K followers.
In essence, it was everything I did to build an audience and start monetizing.
2 years later, we're closing in on 500K across all platforms (maybe even more
when you're reading this).
With that, most of the links and resources don't work as I've changed my
workflow, software, and website as a whole.
The main link you will need is for TweetHunter when I reference a tweet
scheduling software.
Enjoy!
